description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pemigatinib for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic cholangiocarcinoma with a fibroblast growth factor receptor 2 (FGFR2) fusion or rearrangement that have progressed after at least one prior line of systemic therapy.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
